zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Mortimer於1248年9月21日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫時，她的父親Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore18歲，母親Maud de Braose24歲。她於1260年5月14日之前與Sir John FitzAlan III在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可阿盧德爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1292年8月10日在英國素可阿盧德爾享年43歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾豪頓 德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Mortimer于1248年9月21日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾維格莫时，她的父亲Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore18岁，母亲Maud de Braose24岁。她于1260年5月14日之前与Sir John FitzAlan III在英国英格兰韋斯特 素可阿盧德爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1292年8月10日在英国素可阿盧德爾享年43岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾豪頓 德斯。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Mortimer was born on 21 September 1248, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, was 18 and her mother, Maud de Braose, was 24. She married Sir John FitzAlan III before 14 May 1260, in Arundel, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 10 August 1292, in Arundel, Sussex, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Mortimer est née le 21 septembre 1248, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Maud de Braose, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John FitzAlan III avant 14 mai 1260, à Arundel, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 août 1292, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Mortimer am 21. September 1248 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore 18 und ihre Mutter Maud de Braose 24. Sie hat vor 14. Mai 1260 in Arundel, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom Sir John FitzAlan III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. August 1292 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Arundel, Sussex, England und wurde in Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Mortimer è nata il il 21 settembre 1248 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Maud de Braose, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John FitzAlan III prima del 14 maggio 1260, nel Arundel, West Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 agosto 1292, nel Arundel, Sussex, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Mortimerが1248年9月21日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmoreは18歳，母Maud de Braoseは24歳であった。1260年5月14日以前にイギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスアルンデルでSir John FitzAlan IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1292年8月10日にイギリススセックスアルンデルで43歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアハウトン デメスンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Mortimer(이)가 1248년 9월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Braose(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1260년 5월 14일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 아런들에서 Sir John FitzAlan III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 8월 10일 영국 수세스 아런들에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 하우그h턴 데메스니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Mortimer nasceu em 21 de setembro de 1248, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Braose, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John FitzAlan III antes 14 de maio de 1260, em Arundel, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1292, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Mortimer родилась 21 сентября 1248 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Braose, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John FitzAlan III перед 14 май 1260 г. в местности арундель, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 10 августа 1292 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности хотон демесн, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Mortimer nació el 21 de septiembre de 1248, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Maud de Braose, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John FitzAlan III antes de 14 de mayo de 1260, en Arundel, West Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1292, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
